name: whitelabel-ai-support-widget
description: White-label AI support widget with MERN stack

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run backend:dev" "npm run admin:dev" "npm run widget:serve"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run backend:dev" "npm run admin:dev" "npm run widget:serve"
scripts.build: npm run backend:build && npm run admin:build && npm run widget:build
scripts.build:render-backend: cd widget && npm install && npm run build && cd ../backend && mkdir -p widget-assets/build && cp ../widget/loader.js widget-assets/ && cp ../widget/build/widget.js widget-assets/build/ && npm install
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../admin-frontend && npm install && cd ../widget && npm install
